_comment: Camera roster for the multi-Xtion rig. FIRST entry is the reference frame (its <ns>_link is the world root). Identify each camera by stable USB 'port' path (from /sys/bus/usb/devices, e.g. lsusb tree) — the bus/address changes on every re-enumeration, so DO NOT hardcode addresses. multi_camera.launch.py resolves port->current OpenNI2 URI at launch. Optional 'dev' is a fallback URI if 'port' can't be resolved. Depth/color QVGA_30Hz for USB bandwidth. NOTE: 3 Xtions exceed one USB-2 controller's isochronous bandwidth simultaneously; station_scan.py captures them sequentially to avoid this. Port->camera mapping sets the fan order (camera1 ref, camera2 -40deg, camera3 -80deg) — if the fused sweep fans the wrong way, swap ports here.
